title: FamiVoice
description: OpenAudioMC Addon | Restrict your users from moving without being in voicechat!
body:
# FamiVoice
### OpenAudioMc Addon

Restrict your players from playing if they are not connected to the voicechat!

If you have any issues please open an issue on GitHub. Thank you!

### Features:
- Easy to use (Just drop it on your server with OpenAudioMc installed and you're ready to go!)
- Editable message!
